claim: Largelexicon adds Qamus-authored source-clean full fact tables and candidate tooling; not live Qamus and not arbitrary-text certification.

phases.P0: claim boundary, source ledger, artifact freshness, branch isolation
phases.P0.5: thin Mode A vertical slice remains the proof-before-expansion gate
phases.P4/P5: source-clean table allowlist, private external cache policy, committed Qamus-derived full fact tables
phases.P1/P8: source inventory plus lemma/form/stem sample and full generation with generation keys
phases.P2/P9/P10: opt-in largelexicon parser/analyzer path, CLI contract, conservative grammar gates
phases.P11: all-visible-qword denominator and bidirectional handles for Qamus rollout support
phases.P6/P12: skill/curriculum/tutor/readme backfill and no-overclaim release gates

executor_boundary: Qamus live deployment, readback, health, rollback, and tranche closure remain executor-owned.
